title: IS 800-2007 Shear Lug Desgin
description: Design shear lugs in accordance with IS 800-2007..

f_y.description: Fy. Symbol: F_{y}. Units: MPa. Yield strength.

f_u.description: Fu. Symbol: F_{u}. Units: MPa. Ultimate strength.

h.description: h. Symbol: h. Units: mm. Depth of shear lug in plan view.

t_f.description: tf. Symbol: t_{f}. Units: mm. Flange thickness of shear Lug.

b_f.description: bf. Symbol: b_{f}. Units: mm. Flange width of shear lug.

t_w.description: tw. Symbol: t_{w}. Units: mm. Web thickness of shear lug.

d.description: d. Symbol: d. Units: mm. Shear lug embedded depth.

V_z.description: Vz. Symbol: V_{z}. Units: kN. Factored shear force along major axis.

V_y.description: Vy. Symbol: V_{y}. Units: kN. Factored shear force along minor axis.

b_c.description: bc. Symbol: b_{c}. Units: mm. Concrete pedestal width.

d_c.description: dc. Symbol: d_{c}. Units: mm. Concrete pedestal depth.

h_c.description: hc. Symbol: h_{c}. Units: mm. Concrete pedestal height.

g.description: g. Symbol: g. Units: mm. Grout thickness.

f_c.description: fck. Symbol: f_{ck}. Units: MPa. Concrete strength.

fwu.description: Fwu. Symbol: F_{wu}. Units: MPa. Weld electrode ultimate strength.

A_m.description: Am. Symbol: A_{m}. Units: mm. Shear lug to base plate fillet weld.

lay_n.description: layn. No. of horizontal rebar layer effective to resist anchor shear.

leg_n.description: legn. No. of horizontal rebar leg effective to resist anchor shear.

d_r.description: dr. Units: mm. Horizontal rebar diameter.

P_t.description: Pt. Percentage of anchor reinforcement for shear breakout strength calculation.

fyr.description: fyr. Symbol: f_{yr}. Units: MPa. Rebar yield strength.

uid.description: Calculator unique identifier — must match the endpoint uid.

current_unit_system.description: Unit system for input values and output display.

project_details.description: Optional project metadata for the PDF report header.
